text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So, Kitasan Black, you finally arrive! I am the
extraordinary Magical Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And I am the mastermind pulling her str— Ahem. I'm her supporting scientist, Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You told me you want the chance to help
other people, right? Well, look no further…

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm naming you Magical Black, newest
member of the Magical Girl ☆ Sweepy 5!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yep! You'll have nothing to fear 'cause I,
a future great witch, am going to teach you
about magic!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be experimenting on y — er,
I'd like to request your cooperation
in testing "magical items".

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, if I become a magical girl, I'll be able to
save people who are in trouble, just like in an
anime, right?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You've got to let me join! And it'd be great
if Dia could join, too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
"Magical Dia"… That doesn't sound half bad!♪
Her name's a good fit — she's in!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Another guinea pi — another member would be splendid. I'm sure my research will benefit greatly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A serum to dramatically increase muscle
mass or… a mood-elevating tonic to make
you feel you can accomplish anything…
Which shall I have you test first?
